question: प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव आणि त्याशी संबंधित स्थान आयडींची संख्या, राज्याच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि सर्वाधिक ते सर्वात कमी संख्येनुसार क्रमवारीत सूचीबद्ध करा.

FROM dim_state
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id
JOIN dim_location ON dim_district.district_id = dim_location.district_id
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name
ORDER BY location_count DESC;

FROM dim_location dl
JOIN dim_district dd ON dl.district_id = dd.district_id
WHERE dd.district_name ILIKE 'Chittoor'
AND dl.sub_district_name NOT IN (

    FROM dim_location dl2
    JOIN dim_district dd2 ON dl2.district_id = dd2.district_id
